attributes.description: Alerts when `sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate > 0`. Free-list stalls mean extreme memory pressure on the buffer pool.
attributes.name: [SQL Server OTel] Free list stalls

investigation_guide.blob:
## SQL Server free list stalls

### What fired
Free-list stall rate exceeded 0 during the window.

### Why it matters
SQL Server stalls when it cannot find a free page in the buffer pool — a near-catastrophic memory pressure event.

### Triage
1. Check page life expectancy and lazy writer activity.
2. Look at memory grants pending and query memory waits.

### Remediation
- Add memory immediately.
- Kill or throttle memory-intensive queries.

### Tuning
- Fires on any non-zero rate.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// Buffer pool cannot find a free page — indicates extreme memory pressure
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_stalls = MAX(metrics.sqlserver.page.buffer_cache.free_list.stalls.rate),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
| WHERE max_stalls > 0
| KEEP instance_id, max_stalls
